meaning: adj.人种的,种族的,种族间的
examples: Racial prejudice is (an) anathema to me.
The city had faced racial crisis and come through it.
Longstanding poverty has been exacerbated by racial divisions.
Willey says hundreds of students have gotten caught up in fights driven by racial anger.
This reduction in inequality has a racial component, because 75% of the new middle class is non-white.
